briefdescription.para: Transaction created but not yet sent.

memberdef.type: std::pair< std::shared_ptr< IGeniusTransactions >, std::optional< std::vector< uint8_t > > >
memberdef.name: TransactionPair

memberdef.definition: using sgns::TransactionManager::StateChangeCallback = std::function<void( const State &previous, const State &current )>
memberdef.name: StateChangeCallback

briefdescription.para: Unified timeout for all nonce requests (10 seconds).

memberdef.type: const std::unordered_map< std::string, std::pair< TransactionParserFn, TransactionParserFn > >
memberdef.name: transaction_parsers

memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< crdt::GlobalDB > processing_db, std::shared_ptr< boost::asio::io_context > ctx, UTXOManager &utxo_manager, std::shared_ptr< GeniusAccount > account, std::shared_ptr< crypto::Hasher > hasher, bool full_node=false, std::chrono::milliseconds timestamp_tolerance=std::chrono::milliseconds(0), std::chrono::milliseconds mutability_window=std::chrono::milliseconds(0))
memberdef.name: New

parameterdescription.para: The io context used to run its inner methods
Parameter to indicate if the account is a full node
Time to analyze a transaction with the same nonce/key
Window of time where a transaction can be modified

simplesect.para: Instance of the TransactionManager initialized or Error
timestamp_tolerance must be smaller than mutability_window

memberdef.argsstring: (uint64_t amount, std::string transaction_hash, std::string chainid, TokenID tokenid)
memberdef.name: MintFunds

memberdef.argsstring: (uint64_t amount, const std::string &dev_addr, uint64_t peers_cut, const std::string &job_id)
memberdef.name: HoldEscrow

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::string &escrow_path, const SGProcessing::TaskResult &task_result, std::shared_ptr< crdt::AtomicTransaction > crdt_transaction)
memberdef.name: PayEscrow

memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< crdt::GlobalDB > processing_db, std::shared_ptr< boost::asio::io_context > ctx, UTXOManager &utxo_manager, std::shared_ptr< GeniusAccount > account, std::shared_ptr< crypto::Hasher > hasher, bool full_node, std::chrono::milliseconds timestamp_tolerance, std::chrono::milliseconds mutability_window)
memberdef.name: TransactionManager

briefdescription.para: Request heads for relevant topics when we detect we're behind.

node.label: std::map< CID, std::pair< std::shared_ptr< ipfs_lite::ipld::IPLDNode >, std::list< CID >::iterator > >

childnode.edgelabel: < CID, std::pair< std::shared_ptr< ipfs_lite::ipld::IPLDNode >, std::list< CID >::iterator > >

node.label: std::map< CID, std::set< std::pair< CID, std::string > > >
std::map< CID, std::tuple< std::shared_ptr< Subscription >, std::shared_ptr< std::promise< std::shared_ptr< ipfs_lite::ipld::IPLDNode > > > > >

childnode.edgelabel: < CID, std::tuple< std::shared_ptr< Subscription >, std::shared_ptr< std::promise< std::shared_ptr< ipfs_lite::ipld::IPLDNode > > > > >
